# Sinforosa Café - Next.js Project

## Project Overview
Professional, minimalist, and fully responsive website for "Sinforosa Café" using Next.js 14 (App Router) and TailwindCSS.

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 14 with App Router
- TailwindCSS
- shadcn/ui components (Button, Card, CardContent)
- Lucide React icons
- Fonts: Inter (sans-serif) and Cormorant Garamond (serif)

## Development Guidelines
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Minimalist aesthetic with no border-radius
- Warm color palette: amber-800/900, stone-50/100, emerald accents
- Custom CSS animations: fade-in, slide-up, hover-lift, glass-effect
- Smooth transitions and hover effects throughout

## Project Status
✅ Next.js project initialized
🔄 Configuring shadcn/ui and dependencies
